subject: IDWeek coffee - RTS-S implementation notes
body: Dr. Osei-Kwakye - Fritz Rush PID fellow at Glenwood College presenting RTS-S implementation poster and short talk. Your Kintampo cohort work has been central to how our multi-site group thinks about coverage stratification. If you have thirty minutes at IDWeek I would come to you. Fritz

subject: IDWeek coffee - Vanderbilt Global Health
body: Dr. Adamson - Fritz Rush PID fellow at Glenwood College presenting RTS-S implementation poster and short talk at IDWeek. I have followed the Vanderbilt Institute for Global Health pipeline for junior faculty. If 30 minutes at IDWeek is possible I would come to you. Fritz

subject: IDWeek coffee - Boston Children ID
body: Dear Dr. Villaverde - Fritz Rush second-year pediatric infectious disease fellow at Glenwood College Atlanta working on RTS-S implementation multi-site. Presenting at IDWeek. Would value 30 minutes to hear how Boston Children thinks about pediatric ID junior faculty search this cycle. Fritz Rush MD MPH

subject: IDWeek meeting - UW Global Health
body: Dr. Nsanzabana - Fritz Rush PID fellow at Glenwood College. Presenting RTS-S implementation poster and short talk at IDWeek. UW Global Health work on implementation stratification methods has been foundational to how we frame per-site analysis. Would value 30 minutes. Fritz

subject: IDWeek coffee - Baylor Global Pediatric Program
body: Dear Dr. Ochieng - Fritz Rush second-year PID fellow at Glenwood College. Baylor Global Pediatric Program has been the model I keep coming back to when I try to explain to Kevin Osborne what my faculty target shape looks like. Would value 30 minutes at IDWeek. Fritz Rush MD MPH

subject: IDWeek hallway - Emory Rollins
body: Dear Dr. Tanaka - Fritz Rush second-year PID fellow at Glenwood College based in Decatur. We have overlapped at Emory-Glenwood joint sessions but have not been directly introduced. Presenting RTS-S implementation work at IDWeek. Would value 30 minutes. Fritz Rush MD MPH

subject: IDWeek coffee - Bloomberg International Health
body: Dr. Ferreira - Fritz Rush PID fellow at Glenwood College. Presenting RTS-S implementation at IDWeek. Bloomberg International Health implementation-science track is where I keep landing when I map the faculty search field. Would value 30 minutes. Fritz

subject: Authorized pickups Oct 15-19
body: Please note authorized pickups for Carter Rush and Ava Rush for the week of Oct 15-19 - Diane Rush and Rebecca Rush. Both already on file. No changes to routine care instructions. Thank you.

subject: Missing Oct 15 rehearsal
body: Missing Wed Oct 15 rehearsal - out of town for IDWeek. Back for Wed Oct 21 no problem. Thanks. Fritz

subject: R21 reviewer response memo - draft for your review
body: Kevin - Draft response memo for the R21 summary statement attached. Track changes on. Would like to walk through this Oct 16 at your check-in slot. Do not want anything going to the study section until you have hands on it. Fritz

subject: Confluence protocol page update request
body: Would you have a minute to update the Confluence protocol page v3.2 to reflect the Amendment 4 coverage figure of 68.4 percent? The 62 percent number is bleeding into other places. Fritz
